distractor_segments.text: Plate tectonics theory explains the movement of Earth's lithospheric plates.

distractor_segments.title: Distractor 1
distractor_segments.text: The Amazon River is the largest river by discharge volume of water in the world.

distractor_segments.title: Distractor 2
distractor_segments.text: Tectonic plates float on the semi-fluid asthenosphere beneath the lithosphere.

distractor_segments.title: Distractor 3
distractor_segments.text: The Sahara Desert is the largest hot desert in the world.
